prompts.global_base: Quiet collision between minimalism and emotional surrealism. Reality reduced to a few decisive gestures. Vertical poetic landscape built from asymmetry, active negative space, and restraint. Large environmental color fields behave like emotional forces rather than descriptive backgrounds.

mode_overrides.sketch: Composition-search pass. Push silhouette reduction, asymmetry, and emotional spacing before detail.
mode_overrides.final: Quality pass. Keep surfaces calm, forms distilled, and the dominant color field psychologically heavy.
mode_overrides.lock: Style-lock pass. Preserve stillness, the single vivid accent, and painterly paper-edge softness.

rules.subject_anchor: The subject should read as a simplified silhouette or emblematic form, not a descriptive illustration.
rules.reduction: Strip forms to essentials so geometry, silhouette, and interval carry the image.
rules.color_fields: Use large uninterrupted fields of muted color as emotional forces rather than backgrounds.
rules.asymmetry: Let the composition lean decisively to one side so negative space feels active and unresolved.
rules.selective_saturation: Permit one vivid accent against an otherwise restrained palette.
rules.textural_restraint: Keep surfaces smooth and calm, with only soft painterly bleed at edges to avoid a digital feel.
rules.implied_story: Preserve stillness that suggests something has just happened or is about to happen without resolving the narrative.

stillness_breathe.description: Almost-locked camera, slight atmospheric breathing, restrained reflection movement.

vertical_glide.description: Slow vertical glide with tightly capped movement.
